rows.label: tev021801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev021801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Vera for her opinion of xenoforms.

rows.label: tev021801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Vera about recent developments.

rows.label: tev021801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Vera for her opinion of the Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Vera about the Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Vera about the xenoforms living in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00001
rows.name:
After the horrible fate that
befell Earth, some humans have
come to resent all xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00002
rows.name:
But as a scientist, I am always eager to see
examples of lifeforms who acquired intelligence
through a different evolutionary path.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00003
rows.name:
From what I understand, they've found ruins
throughout the planet that suggest intelligent
life existed here previously.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00004
rows.name:
I always relish opportunities to
encounter the unknown. What about you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00007
rows.name:
I may be a rough-and-tumble BLADE,
but believe it or not, I was once
studying to be a biologist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00008
rows.name:
When I was a student, I was always off
on one cross-country trip after another,
doing fieldwork with my professor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00009
rows.name:
We traversed jungles and deserts hunting
for rare animals and fossils...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00010
rows.name:
And when we'd find one, we'd jump up
and down with glee. Like children! Ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00011
rows.name:
My professor stayed behind on Earth, but I
know he'd have been thrilled to come here and
see all the unidentified species on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00019
rows.name:
I spoke with Tatsu, one of the native
people discovered by Elma's team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00020
rows.name:
It was quite perplexing. These Nopon seem rather...
physically weak, let's say. And they don't strike
me as being particularly intelligent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00021
rows.name:
And yet, they have somehow
managed to survive on this
inhospitable world. I wonder how?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00022
rows.name:
As such ideal targets of
predation, one would assume
they'd be wiped out quite easily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00023
rows.name:
There must be some reason why they're
suited to this environment. It's a
puzzle I look forward to solving![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00038
rows.name:
From their appearance, I would
conjecture that they evolved from
some sort of amphibious creature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00039
rows.name:
But they don't seem to require an aquatic
environment, and their behavior has little
in common with Earth's amphibians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00040
rows.name:
I wonder what evolutionary path
could have led to the acquisition
of such incredible intelligence?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00041
rows.name:
What fantastic research subjects they make! I'm
thinking I should live on this ship of theirs for
a while in order to study them more closely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00042
rows.name:
It would also give me an opportunity
to study some of the rare indigen
specimens they've collected.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00057
rows.name:
Considering the astronomical odds against the evolution
of intelligent life, one wouldn't expect the universe
to contain many other species with humanlike smarts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00058
rows.name:
And yet, we've encountered numerous
intelligent xenoforms that each
possess unique characteristics.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00059
rows.name:
However, as varied as they
appear, cellular analysis
reveals numerous common factors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00060
rows.name:
I may be an atheist, but I can understand how others
would turn to the idea of an omnipotent god distributing
life and intelligence throughout the cosmos.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00061
rows.name:
Heh. But if I am to be a true
biologist, I suppose I need to
search for a more rational explanation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Vera about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00062
rows.name:
I'd been trying to get some vigent blood
for a while, and that Orleron fellow
just brought me some as a present.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00063
rows.name:
But apparently his gift came with certain...expectations.
He got quite assertive and pushy afterward, saying he
would make me happy if I would only be with him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00064
rows.name:
If the fool thinks such behavior
will make me fall in love with
him, he couldn't be more wrong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00067
rows.name:
I'd been trying to get some vigent blood
for a while, and that Orleron fellow
just brought me some as a present.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00068
rows.name:
But then he placed a gentle hand on
my arm and said he would do anything
for me. It was...uncomfortable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00069
rows.name:
If he thinks such behavior will
make me fall in love with him,
he couldn't be more wrong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Vera if she's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00070
rows.name:
Are you familiar with the
waste-processing units over
in the industrial district?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00071
rows.name:
I hear there's a woman down there named
Liza who handles everything by using the
special properties of the Zaruboggan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00072
rows.name:
I only recently learned of their
special purification abilities myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00073
rows.name:
But it's quite the brainstorm to use
them for our waste-management needs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021801_MSG00074
rows.name:
With enough ideas like that, don't you think
that maybe we humans could get a little bit
closer with the others on this ship?[ST:wait ]
